posts.snippet: Остання місія «Терміта»! НРК 66 ОМБр успішно евакуював пораненого воїна Пам'ятаєте відео, на якому наш оператор «Кас» врятував НРК від ворожого FPV? Той самий екіпаж «Formula1», той самий TerMIT роти наземних безпілотних систем при ББС «MARA». Цього разу завдання куди складніше — евакуація пораненого побратима з третього мехбату «Fireflies». Через серйозне поранення евакуацію довелося проводит

posts.snippet: Drone footage provided by the Birds of Magyar unit shows the destruction of a Russian TOS-1A 220mm MLRS. The vehicle was initially critically damaged by a Bulava loitering munition, causing the detonation of a few missiles, and was later finished off by FPV UAVs.
posts.snippet_en: Drone footage provided by the Birds of Magyar unit shows the destruction of a Russian TOS-1A 220mm MLRS. The vehicle was initially critically damaged by a Bulava loitering munition, causing the detonation of a few missiles, and was later finished off by FPV UAVs.

posts.snippet: Ukrainian soldiers survived Russian FPV drone attack. Kostiantinivka direction. 36th Marine Brigade. Left video is Russian POV. At 0:11 the cameraman holding a drone detector. Presumably this is how they knew they were being targeted.
posts.snippet_en: Ukrainian soldiers survived Russian FPV drone attack. Kostiantinivka direction. 36th Marine Brigade. Left video is Russian POV. At 0:11 the cameraman holding a drone detector. Presumably this is how they knew they were being targeted.
